run.display_title: Fix race in `exit_process` where parent can be dropped before `find_reaper_process`

run.name: Test loongarch64

head_commit.message:
Fix race in `exit_process` where parent can be dropped before `find_reaper_process`

A zombie process can be reaped and removed from its parent's children
map. If the parent then exits, it won't move the reaped child to a new
reaper, leaving the child's `Weak` parent reference dangling. Defer
`set_zombie` until after `move_children_to_reaper_process` so the
process stays in its parent's children map and any exiting ancestor
will update the parent reference before becoming zombie itself.

run.display_title: Fix race in `exit_process` where parent can be dropped before `find_reaper_process`
